mapper.select: SELECT * FROM announcements WHERE status = 1 AND target IN ('all', 'user') AND (start_time IS NULL OR start_time <= #{now}) AND (end_time IS NULL OR end_time >= #{now}) ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at DESC

SELECT * FROM announcements WHERE status = 1 AND target IN ('all', 'admin') AND (start_time IS NULL OR start_time <= #{now}) AND (end_time IS NULL OR end_time >= #{now}) ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at DESC
